3195250.name: Purge Inc.
3195250.description:
Form your team or go solo and face your deepest fears in Purge Inc. step into the shadows with your friends or tackle the terror alone as you track down malevolent spirits and uncover the secrets of haunted locations.

In this cooperative and single-player horror adventure, teamwork is vital, but you can also brave the hunt on your own. Each player uses specialized ghost-hunting equipment to aid in tracking and capturing the supernatural entities. Utilize advanced tools and technology to locate ghosts, and survive heart-pounding encounters with restless spirits. With procedurally generated haunted environments, every hunt presents a unique and unpredictable challenge.

Features:

  • Co-op and Single-Player Gameplay: Join forces with friends or face the horror alone in a solo experience.
  • Advanced Equipment: Utilize state-of-the-art ghost-hunting tools to track and capture spirits.
  • Various Bosses: You will encounter various unique bosses in the game, each with their own distinct story. Let's see what you will do in this situation.
  • End-Game Currency: After completing each level, you will have currency that you can spend. With this, you can unlock new maps, new items, and even new recipes.
  • Dynamic Environments: Explore haunted locations that change with each game.
  • Terrifying Encounters: Face off against vengeful spirits in suspenseful and frightening situations.
  • Immersive Atmosphere: Experience a deeply atmospheric and chilling horror setting.
Will you and your team, or just you alone, uncover the dark truths behind the hauntings, or will you become another lost soul? The ghosts are waiting.

Prepare for the hunt.
